name: Hatten Land Limited
summary: Hatten Land Limited engages in the property development activities in Malaysia and Singapore. The company primarily develops residential, hotel, and commercial properties. It is also involved in the provision of management, marketing, and development consultancy services, as well as management consultancy/business and project advisory and consultancy services; management and leasing of mall; and development of software, programming activities, and e-commerce applications. Hatten Land Limited is headquartered in Malacca City, Malaysia. Hatten Land Limited is a subsidiary of Hatten Holdings Pte Ltd.
